nodes.context: Bolivian criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking and human trafficking, operating in the Chapare region.
Six coca growers' federations in the Chapare region that merged to form the Chapare Cartel.

nodes.standard_name: Federación Especial de Colonizadores de Chimoré
nodes.original_text_name: Federación Especial de Colonizadores de Chimoré
nodes.context: Oldest coca growers' federation in the Chapare region, founded in 1964.

edges.context: The Chapare Cartel originated from the merger of the six Federaciones Cocaleras del Trópico.

edges.target: Federación Especial de Colonizadores de Chimoré
edges.context: The Federación Especial de Colonizadores de Chimoré is one of the six federations that make up the Federaciones Cocaleras del Trópico.
